facts.claim: Intensicare inherits the AMH Data Platform's data-availability SLO: 99,5% (99.5%) for analytics.

AMH DP batch pipeline latency target for Silver-Entities is P95 < 30 min; this is the trigger metric for reconsidering Alternativa B (dedicated MSK streaming channel) in Fase 4 if insufficient for ICU use case.

Alternativa A (independent platform with own ingestion/storage stack) was rejected; estimated cost was 3-5x higher (custo 3-5x maior) than consuming the AMH Data Platform, plus infra duplication and data inconsistency risk.
AMH Data Platform (and thus Intensicare's ECS Fargate deployment, per Implicação 8) runs in AWS region sa-east-1.
Gold write-back analytical fact tables for Intensicare are named exactly fact_patient_score and fact_alert.
AMH Data Platform medallion lakehouse layers, in order, are: Raw → Bronze → Silver-Rules → Silver-Entities → Gold.

Patient identity source is the Master Patient Index (MPI), which performs deterministic and probabilistic linking (linking determinístico e probabilístico); Intensicare consumes its mpi_id and mints no identifiers of its own.
Alternativa B's proposed escape-hatch mechanism, if reconsidered, is one additional dedicated MSK topic (streaming channel) feeding Intensicare directly, bypassing the AMH DP batch pipeline.
ADR-001 status is Proposto (Proposed), dated 26/06/2026, authored by Parreira (Hermes DevOps Orchestrator); stakeholders are CTO Office and Time de Engenharia AMH.

Ingestion technologies explicitly excluded from Intensicare's own scope: NiFi, Kafka, Debezium (own ingestion stack); source transactional systems feeding AMH DP via CDC are Tasy ERP, OMNI, Diagnose via Debezium → MSK → Flink.

constraints.text: MUST NOT implement own data ingestion (NiFi/Kafka/Debezium); MUST read clinical data only from the AMH Gold layer via Amazon Athena. Verbatim PT: "O Intensicare NÃO implementará ingestão própria (NiFi, Kafka, Debezium). Lerá dados clínicos do Gold layer da AMH Data Platform via Amazon Athena." EN gloss: Athena-only reads against AMH Gold; no proprietary ingestion pipeline.

MUST use the existing MPI's mpi_id as patient identity; MUST NOT create proprietary patient identifiers. Verbatim PT: "O Intensicare usará o mpi_id do MPI existente. Não criará identificadores próprios de paciente." EN gloss: MPI mpi_id is the sole patient-identity key.

PostgreSQL/TimescaleDB MUST be used only for operational application state (computed scores, active alerts, threshold configurations), never as an analytical data store. Verbatim PT: "O Intensicare manterá um banco PostgreSQL/TimescaleDB próprio para estado operacional (scores calculados, alertas ativos, configurações de thresholds). Estes são dados de aplicação, não dados analíticos." EN gloss: operational-only PostgreSQL/TimescaleDB, not analytical.

MUST write historical/aggregated scores back to the AMH Gold layer as analytical facts fact_patient_score and fact_alert, enabling corporate analytics. Verbatim PT: "Scores históricos e agregados serão gravados de volta ao Gold layer da AMH Data Platform como fatos analíticos (fact_patient_score, fact_alert), permitindo analytics corporativo." EN gloss: Gold write-back to fact_patient_score/fact_alert is mandatory.

MUST consume enriched clinical context via the existing HAPI FHIR server; MUST NOT operate its own FHIR server. Verbatim PT: "O Intensicare consumirá dados clínicos via HAPI FHIR existente quando precisar de contexto enriquecido. Não operará seu próprio servidor FHIR." EN gloss: existing HAPI FHIR only, no own FHIR server.

Metrics and traces MUST be emitted via OpenTelemetry into the existing AMP + Grafana stack. Verbatim PT: "Métricas e traces serão emitidos via OpenTelemetry para o stack AMP + Grafana existente." EN gloss: OTEL → AMP/Grafana is the sole observability path.

MUST inherit the AMH Data Platform security model: IAM Identity Center for SSO, per-tenant KMS for encryption, and Lake Formation ABAC for data access. Verbatim PT: "O Intensicare herdará o modelo de segurança da AMH Data Platform (IAM Identity Center para SSO, KMS por tenant para criptografia, ABAC via Lake Formation para acesso a dados)." EN gloss: IAM Identity Center SSO + per-tenant KMS + Lake Formation ABAC, inherited not reimplemented.

MUST deploy on ECS Fargate in the same VPC and AWS accounts as the AMH Data Platform (region sa-east-1 per §Contexto), aligned to corporate standard. Verbatim PT: "O Intensicare será deployado em ECS Fargate na mesma VPC e contas AWS da AMH Data Platform, alinhado ao padrão corporativo." EN gloss: ECS Fargate, shared VPC/accounts, sa-east-1.

Any change to the AMH Gold schema is a breaking change for Intensicare and MUST be versioned. Verbatim PT: "Mudanças no schema Gold da AMH Data Platform são breaking changes para o Intensicare e devem ser versionadas." EN gloss: Gold schema changes = versioned breaking changes, treat accordingly.

Intensicare inherits the AMH Data Platform's 99.5% data-availability SLO for analytics; downstream design must not assume higher availability than this without an explicit escape hatch. Verbatim PT: "O Intensicare herda os SLOs da AMH Data Platform para disponibilidade de dados (99,5% analytics)." EN gloss: 99.5% data-availability SLO, inherited.

open_questions: ADR-001 does not define the numeric ICU-specific latency requirement that would render the AMH DP's P95 < 30 min (Silver-Entities) batch pipeline 'insuficiente para o caso de uso de UTI' — the Alternativa B (MSK streaming escape hatch) trigger threshold is qualitative only ('Fase 4' reconsideration), not quantified.
ADR-001 does not specify who owns/approves the Fase 4 decision to activate Alternativa B, nor the SLA for provisioning the additional MSK topic if triggered.
